metadata.name: Unified Media Experience
metadata.description: Fully configurable all-in-one setup based on Tamtaro's template and optimized for Omni and Fusion.
metadata.author: Bot-Bid-Raiser

inputs.name: UME AIOStreams v2.1.1: Debrid/Usenet Mode
inputs.description: A configurable AIOStreams setup optimized for Omni and Fusion.

inputs.name: UME AIOStreams v2.1.1: P2P Mode
inputs.description: No services selected. In some countries, torrenting may be restricted, so a VPN or a debrid service may be required.

inputs.name: Preferred Languages
inputs.description: Select your preferred stream languages. These are placed first in the language ranking. Original, Dual Audio, Multi, Dubbed, and Unknown are automatically appended after your selections. Fine-tune the full order in Filters → Language after import. The included formatter will display only your preferred languages. Preferred is duplicated as Required, so streams with non-preferred languages will be removed.

inputs.name: Addon Options
inputs.description: This setup includes a base addon selection that should work for most setups. If you want to keep your current addons page untouched, enable **No Addons**.

subOptions.name: No Addons
subOptions.description: If enabled, no addons from this template will be imported. Your existing addon list, groups, and fetching strategy will remain unchanged, while filters, expressions, and other settings can still be applied.

subOptions.name: No Anime
subOptions.description: If enabled, anime-related addons will be removed from the imported addon list.

subOptions.name: Debridio
subOptions.description: If enabled, [Debridio Scraper](https://debridio.com) will be added. You will need your Debridio API key from your account settings.

subOptions.name: HTTP Addons
subOptions.description: If enabled, HTTP stream addons will be included. These can be useful as backup sources for niche or older titles, especially without Usenet. HTTP addons are automatically included in P2P mode.

subOptions.name: Global Timeout
subOptions.description: Enter the time in ms that addons may take before timing out. Default: 6500 ms.

inputs.name: Choose your App
inputs.description: Select which app this template should target.

inputs.name: Formatter Style
inputs.description: Choose the formatter style for Omni.

inputs.name: Formatter Style
inputs.description: Choose the formatter style for Fusion.

inputs.name: TorBox Tier Limit
inputs.description: Apply a size cap for uncached downloads based on your TorBox subscription tier. Selecting Pro will automatically add the TorBox Search (Usenet) addon.

inputs.name: Device Specific Exclusions
inputs.description: Use this to exclude formats your device cannot handle reliably. These exclusions should be set here, not only in the AIOS UI filter, because they need to be applied at a specific stage in the SEL filtering process.

inputs.name: Passthrough Options
inputs.description: Allow selected streams to bypass SEL filters and optionally pin them to the top. All other streams will still follow the default SEL setup. Passthrough streams are also exempt from any additional filtering limits configured below.

subOptions.description: Language Passthrough Options

subOptions.name: Language Passthrough
subOptions.description: Always allow streams in the selected language to bypass SEL filters if available. The selected language is also appended to Preferred so it can still appear in the formatter.

subOptions.name: Language Passthrough Amount
subOptions.description: Choose how many streams in the selected language may bypass SEL filters.

subOptions.name: Pin Language Passthrough
subOptions.description: Pin language passthrough streams to the top.

subOptions.name: Anime Only
subOptions.description: Apply the selected language passthrough only to anime results. If the passthrough language is English, Dual Audio and SeaDex results may also be included.
Visual Tags Passthrough Options

subOptions.name: Visual Tags Passthrough
subOptions.description: Allow up to 5 results containing each selected visual tag to bypass SEL filters.

subOptions.name: Pin Visual Tags
subOptions.description: Pin visual tag passthrough streams to the top.
Top 1 Pin Options

subOptions.name: Pin Top 1 Per Resolution
subOptions.description: Pin the top result for each resolution, up to 3 total.

subOptions.name: Pin Top 1 Per Quality/Resolution
subOptions.description: Pin the top result for each Quality/Resolution combination, up to 6 total.

inputs.name: Usenet Options
inputs.description: Configure passthrough and sorting behavior for Usenet results. Streams selected here are exempt from the additional filtering limits below.

subOptions.name: Health-Checked NZB Passthrough
subOptions.description: **NZB Passthrough** allows health-checked Zyclops or UsenetStreamer results to bypass SEL filters. **NZB-Only Passthrough** allows only health-checked Usenet results and removes the rest.

subOptions.name: Usenet Per Quality/Resolution Passthrough
subOptions.description: Allow the top Usenet results from each Quality/Resolution category to bypass SEL filters. Unless health-checked, Usenet results will still rank below cached Debrid results in the same category.

subOptions.name: Boost Cached Usenet
subOptions.description: Prioritize cached Usenet results on the same level as cached Debrid results. Use this only if your Usenet health is as reliable as your Debrid setup.

subOptions.name: Boost All Usenet
subOptions.description: Merge uncached and cached Usenet results with cached Debrid instead of keeping uncached Usenet in a separate group.

inputs.name: Additional Limit Options
inputs.description: These options apply extra limits after the core SEL stage. Use passthrough or pin options first if you want more control without cutting the result set too aggressively.

subOptions.description: These options run after the core SEL stage and reduce the remaining result set even further. Streams not selected here will be removed, except passthrough streams, library streams, and SeaDex results. If a limit filter produces zero results, it is ignored.

subOptions.name: Top Results Per Resolution
subOptions.description: Keep only the top X results per Resolution after the core SEL stage, up to 3 top resolutions. Passthrough, library, and SeaDex results are exempt.

subOptions.name: Top Results Per Quality/Resolution
subOptions.description: Keep only the top X results per Quality/Resolution category after the core SEL stage. Passthrough, library, and SeaDex results are exempt. Lower values are generally the safest choice.

subOptions.name: Top 5 DV+HDR, 5 HDR Only, 5 SDR
subOptions.description: From the remaining results after the core SEL stage, keep up to 5 DV/HDR, 5 HDR-only, and 5 SDR results. Passthrough, library, and SeaDex results are exempt.

subOptions.name: Global Result Limit
subOptions.description: Limit the remaining results after the core SEL stage to the overall top X results. Passthrough, library, and SeaDex results are exempt. Leave blank to keep a broader mix of resolutions and qualities.

inputs.name: Misc Options
inputs.description: Options for keeping custom SEL edits, preserving ranked expressions, and setting the addon name.

subOptions.name: Keep Custom SEL Edits
subOptions.description: Enable this to prevent synced SEL or regex edits from being overwritten during import. Leave it disabled if you want to keep the default synced scores and filtering behavior from the template.

subOptions.name: Ignore Ranked Stream Expression Overwrite
subOptions.description: Enable this to preserve your existing additional Ranked Stream Expressions. Synced RSE URLs will still be imported.

subOptions.name: Addon Name
subOptions.description: Choose the name that AIOStreams should use in Stremio.

inputs.description: **This template does not include any catalogs.** It is intended to work well with AIOMetadata-based setups. Add catalogs separately after import if needed.

config.addonDescription: Custom AIOStreams setup based on the Tamtaro SEL Setup and optimized for Omni and Fusion. Features advanced filtering with Stream Expression Language and smart sorting with Vidhin's Regex Patterns.

excludedStreamExpressions.expression: /*ongoingSeasonPack*/((queryType=='series' or queryType=='anime.series') and ongoingSeason and (daysSinceLastAired <-1 or daysUntilNextEpisode>=0))?seasonPack(streams,'onlySeasons'):[]

excludedStreamExpressions.__if: inputs.passthrough.language != none or inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes != 0 or !inputs.usenet.usenetHealth includes none or inputs.passthrough.visualTag or inputs.passthrough.top1ResPin or inputs.passthrough.top1QualResPin
excludedStreamExpressions.expression: /*Bad 4k Anime*/ (isAnime and originalLanguage != 'English' and count(quality(resolution(cached(streams), '2160p'), 'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(seadex(resolution(streams, '2160p'))) == 0 and count(rseMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'BD T1', 'BD T2', 'BD T3', 'BD T4', 'BD T5', 'BD T6', 'BD T7', 'BD T8', 'Remux T1', 'Remux T2', 'Remux T3', 'Web T1', 'Web T2', 'Web T3', 'Web T4', 'Web T5', 'Web T6')) == 0 )? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), resolution(streams, '2160p')) : []

/*Upscaled 4k*/(queryType=='movie' or queryType =='series') and (count(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray REMUX'))>=1) and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(rseMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3', 'DE Web T1', 'DE Web T2', 'DE Web T3', 'DE Web Scene', 'Web T1', 'Web T2', 'Web T3', 'Web Scene')) == 0? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),resolution(streams,'2160p')):[]

/*Bad 4k Bluray*/(queryType=='movie' or queryType =='series') and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(rseMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3')) == 0? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),resolution(quality(streams, 'Bluray'),'2160p')):[]

/*Bad 1080P Bluray*/(queryType=='movie') and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX'))==0 and (count(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray REMUX'))==0) and count(rseMatched(resolution(quality(streams, 'Bluray'), '1080p'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3')) == 0 ? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray')):[]

/* ⚠️ Low SEL Score*/ count(streamExpressionScore(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), merge(cached(streams), type(streams,'p2p','http'))), isAnime ? 100 : (queryType == 'series' ? 200 : 500))) < 10 ? [] : streamExpressionScore(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), streams), -999999, isAnime ? 100 : (queryType == 'series' ? 1050 : 2250))

/*Extra Cached (HQ)*/ merge( slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'2160p','1440p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'1080p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'720p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'WEBRip'),'576p','480p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'WEBRip'),'Unknown'), 3))

/*Extra Cached (LQ)*/ merge( slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'HDTV','HDRip'),'2160p','1440p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'2160p','1440p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'CAM','TS'),'2160p','1440p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'),'576p','480p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'Unknown'),'576p','480p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'Unknown'),'Unknown'), 3))

/*Extra Uncached (All)*/ merge( slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'2160p','1440p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'1080p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'720p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'576p','480p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'Unknown'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray'),'2160p','1440p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray'),'1080p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray'),'720p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray'),'576p','480p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray'),'Unknown'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'WEB-DL'),'720p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'WEB-DL'),'576p','480p','360p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'WEB-DL'),'Unknown'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'WEBRip'),'2160p','1440p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'HDTV','HDRip','DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'2160p','1440p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'HDTV','HDRip','DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'1080p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'HDTV','HDRip','DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'720p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'HDTV','HDRip','DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'576p','480p','360p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'HDTV','HDRip','DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'Unknown'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'),'2160p','1440p'), 3), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Unknown'),'Unknown'), 3))

/*Final Limit (All)*/ merge(count(quality(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'Bluray REMUX','Bluray','WEB-DL','WEBRip'))>12? quality(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),streams),'HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV','CAM','TS','TC','SCR'):count(quality(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'Bluray REMUX','Bluray','WEB-DL','WEBRip','HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV'))>12? quality(streams,'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'):[], count(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p'))>15? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'720p','576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'))): count(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p'))>12? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'720p','576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'),3))): count(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p'))>12? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'))): count(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p'))>9? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'), 3))): count(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p'))>6? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'),6))): count(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p'))>3? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(slice(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), 6), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'),-1))):[])

excludedStreamExpressions.__if: inputs.passthrough.language != none and inputs.passthrough.language != English and !inputs.passthrough.languagePin and inputs.passthrough.languageAnimeOnly
inputs.passthrough.language != none and inputs.passthrough.language != English and inputs.passthrough.languagePin and inputs.passthrough.languageAnimeOnly
inputs.passthrough.language == English and inputs.passthrough.languagePin and inputs.passthrough.languageAnimeOnly
excludedStreamExpressions.expression: /*Pin Anime Only {{inputs.passthrough.languageAmount}} {{inputs.passthrough.language}} Passthrough*/ isAnime ? merge(pin(seadex(streams)), pin(passthrough(slice(language(merge(cached(streams), type(streams, 'p2p','http','usenet','stremio-usenet')), '{{inputs.passthrough.language}}', 'Dual Audio'), 0, {{inputs.passthrough.languageAmount}}), 'excluded', 'required'), 'top')) : []

/*Pin Top 1 Per Resolution (3 Max)*/ pin(merge(seadex(streams), passthrough(slice(negate(merge(uncached(type(streams, 'debrid'))), merge(slice(resolution(streams,'2160p'), 0, 1), slice(resolution(streams,'1080p'), 0, 1), slice(resolution(streams,'720p'), 0, 1), slice(resolution(streams,'576p','480p','Unknown'), 0, 1))), 0, 3), 'excluded', 'required')), 'top')

/*Top {{inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes}} Usenet Per Quality/Resolution*/ passthrough(slice(negate(merge(library(streams), message(streams,'includes','✅','🧝')), merge(slice(quality(resolution(type(streams, 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'),'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX'),0,{{inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes}}),slice(quality(resolution(type(streams, 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'),'2160p'),'Bluray'),0,{{inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes}}), slice(quality(resolution(type(streams, 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'),'2160p'),'WEB-DL'),0,{{inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes}}),slice(quality(resolution(type(streams, 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'),'1080p'),'Bluray REMUX'),0,{{inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes}}), slice(quality(resolution(type(streams, 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'),'1080p'),'Bluray'),0,{{inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes}}),slice(quality(resolution(type(streams, 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'),'1080p'),'WEB-DL'),0,{{inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes}}), slice(quality(resolution(type(streams, 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'),'720p'),'Bluray REMUX'),0,{{inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes}}),slice(quality(resolution(type(streams, 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'),'720p'),'Bluray'),0,{{inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes}}), slice(quality(resolution(type(streams, 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'),'720p'),'WEB-DL'),0,{{inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes}}))), 0, {{inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes}}*6), 'excluded', 'required')

requiredStreamExpressions.expression: /*Top {{inputs.filterLimit.top1Res}} Per Resolution*/ merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), count(slice(merge(slice(resolution(streams,'2160p'), 0, {{inputs.filterLimit.top1Res}}), slice(resolution(streams,'1080p'), 0, {{inputs.filterLimit.top1Res}}), slice(resolution(streams,'720p'), 0, {{inputs.filterLimit.top1Res}}), slice(resolution(streams,'576p','480p','Unknown'), 0, {{inputs.filterLimit.top1Res}} )), 0, {{inputs.filterLimit.top1Res}}*3)) > 0? slice(merge(slice(resolution(streams,'2160p'), 0, {{inputs.filterLimit.top1Res}}), slice(resolution(streams,'1080p'), 0, {{inputs.filterLimit.top1Res}}), slice(resolution(streams,'720p'), 0, {{inputs.filterLimit.top1Res}}), slice(resolution(streams,'576p','480p','Unknown'), 0, {{inputs.filterLimit.top1Res}} )), 0, {{inputs.filterLimit.top1Res}}*3) : streams)

/*Only 5 x DV+HDR/HDR Only/SDR*/merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), count(slice(resolution(visualTag(visualTag(streams, 'DV'), 'HDR', 'HDR10','HDR10+'), '2160p', '1080p', '720p', '480p', 'Unknown'), 0, 5), slice(resolution(negate(visualTag(streams, 'DV'), visualTag(streams, 'HDR', 'HDR10','HDR10+')),  '2160p', '1080p', '720p', '480p', 'Unknown'), 0, 5), slice(resolution(negate(merge(visualTag(streams, 'HDR', 'HDR10', 'HDR10+', 'DV')), visualTag(streams, 'SDR', 'HLG', '10bit', 'IMAX', 'Unknown')), '2160p', '1080p', '720p', '480p', 'Unknown'), 0, 5)) >0? merge(slice(resolution(visualTag(visualTag(streams, 'DV'), 'HDR', 'HDR10','HDR10+'), '2160p', '1080p', '720p', '480p', 'Unknown'), 0, 5), slice(resolution(negate(visualTag(streams, 'DV'), visualTag(streams, 'HDR', 'HDR10','HDR10+')),  '2160p', '1080p', '720p', '480p', 'Unknown'), 0, 5), slice(resolution(negate(merge(visualTag(streams, 'HDR', 'HDR10', 'HDR10+', 'DV')), visualTag(streams, 'SDR', 'HLG', '10bit', 'IMAX', 'Unknown')), '2160p', '1080p', '720p', '480p', 'Unknown'), 0, 5)) : streams)

__value.expression: /*#Radarr*/ /*TrueHD*/ queryType=='movie' ? negate(merge(audioTag(streams, 'Atmos'), regexMatched(streams, 'TrueHD Exclude Groups')), audioTag(streams, 'TrueHD')) : []

__value.__if: inputs.passthrough.language != none or inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes != 0 or !inputs.usenet.usenetHealth includes none or inputs.passthrough.visualTag or inputs.passthrough.top1ResPin or inputs.passthrough.top1QualResPin
__value.expression: /*Bad 4k Anime*/ (isAnime and originalLanguage != 'English' and count(quality(resolution(cached(streams), '2160p'), 'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(seadex(resolution(streams, '2160p'))) == 0 and count(rseMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'BD T1', 'BD T2', 'BD T3', 'BD T4', 'BD T5', 'BD T6', 'BD T7', 'BD T8', 'Remux T1', 'Remux T2', 'Remux T3', 'Web T1', 'Web T2', 'Web T3', 'Web T4', 'Web T5', 'Web T6')) == 0 )? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), resolution(streams, '2160p')) : []

__value.__if: inputs.passthrough.language != none or inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes != 0 or !inputs.usenet.usenetHealth includes none or inputs.passthrough.visualTag or inputs.passthrough.top1ResPin or inputs.passthrough.top1QualResPin
__value.expression: /*Upscaled 4k*/(queryType=='movie' or queryType =='series') and (count(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray REMUX'))>=1) and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(rseMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3', 'DE Web T1', 'DE Web T2', 'DE Web T3', 'DE Web Scene', 'Web T1', 'Web T2', 'Web T3', 'Web Scene')) == 0? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),resolution(streams,'2160p')):[]

__value.__if: inputs.passthrough.language != none or inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes != 0 or !inputs.usenet.usenetHealth includes none or inputs.passthrough.visualTag or inputs.passthrough.top1ResPin or inputs.passthrough.top1QualResPin
__value.expression: /*Bad 4k Bluray*/(queryType=='movie' or queryType =='series') and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(rseMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3')) == 0? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),resolution(quality(streams, 'Bluray'),'2160p')):[]

__value.__if: inputs.passthrough.language != none or inputs.usenet.usenetTopQualRes != 0 or !inputs.usenet.usenetHealth includes none or inputs.passthrough.visualTag or inputs.passthrough.top1ResPin or inputs.passthrough.top1QualResPin
__value.expression: /*Bad 1080P Bluray*/(queryType=='movie') and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX'))==0 and (count(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray REMUX'))==0) and count(rseMatched(resolution(quality(streams, 'Bluray'), '1080p'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3')) == 0 ? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray')):[]

definition.name: {stream.filename}, SEL {stream.seScore} {stream.nSeScore::pstar}, {stream.rseMatched}, {stream.message}
